covered_requirements: FR1: The system shall allow a customer to create a new account.
FR2: The system shall collect and store customer information required for account creation.
BR1: Each customer account must be uniquely identifiable (e.g., by email or username).
BR2: Account creation may require verification of customer identity or contact information.
V1: All mandatory fields must be provided and valid before account creation.
V2: Email address format must be valid.
V3: Password must meet complexity requirements (e.g., length, character types).
V4: Username or email must not already exist in the system.
missing_coverage: Missing test for database unavailability or transaction failure (dependency: Database or user store must be available and operational).
Missing test for email service failure during verification (dependency: Email service or verification system may be required).
Missing test for duplicate account prevention when username (not email) is used as unique identifier.
Missing test for special characters or SQL injection in input fields (security gap risk).
Missing test for age or eligibility restrictions (if applicable per missing information).
Missing test for data retention or privacy policy compliance (e.g., GDPR checkbox).
Missing test for concurrent account creation attempts (race condition risk).
Missing test for account creation with all optional fields provided (if any).
Missing test for account creation with empty password confirmation field.
Missing test for account creation with whitespace-only mandatory fields.
duplicate_testcases: TC006 (minimum length boundary) and TC009 (below minimum length) are complementary but not duplicates.
TC007 (maximum length boundary) and TC008 (exceeding maximum length) are complementary but not duplicates.
No exact duplicate test cases found; however, TC001 and TC006/TC007 overlap in positive path coverage.
recommendations: Add test cases for database unavailability and email service failure to cover dependencies.
Add test cases for SQL injection, XSS, and special character handling in input fields.
Add test case for username uniqueness (if username is separate from email).
Add test case for concurrent registration attempts with the same email to check race conditions.
Add test case for account creation with whitespace-only or leading/trailing spaces in fields.
Add test case for password confirmation mismatch.
Add test case for account creation with all optional fields (if defined).
Clarify password complexity rules (exact requirements) and update test data accordingly.
Add test case for age/eligibility restrictions if required by business rules.
Add test case for privacy policy acceptance (checkbox) if required.
Consider adding a test for account creation with a very long email address (boundary).
Review TC010: it assumes email verification is implemented; if not, this test should be conditional or removed.
